verdict_reasoning: BAX is canonically a cytosolic/mitochondrial outer membrane pro-apoptotic effector, but during apoptosis it translocates and oligomerizes at the mitochondrial outer membrane and is also externalized/exposed on the plasma membrane outer leaflet of dying cells (documented BAX surface exposure during apoptosis/ICD). This is a cell-death-induced ecto-pool rather than baseline surface residency, so contextual via cell_state_induced is the right call rather than no.
